title: John Kominek
text: Home * People * John Kominek John Kominek at the WCCC 2002 [1] John Kominek , an American computer scientist and Ph.D. in 2009 on language technology from Carnegie Mellon University under Alan W. Black . Before. he was affiliated with the University of Waterloo , working on fractal compression [2] . Interested in computer chess, John Kominek is author of the experimental chess program Sharky , a best-first approach which played the WCCC 2002 in Maastricht . He further worked on a revamped version of Nalimov Tablebases , where he found an error in stat file kbpkn.tbs [3] .
